UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the EduSpark platform, encompassing both students and instructors, storing their general profile information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for communication and as a unique identifier for external authentication.

name.description: The full name of the user.

bio.description: A short biography or description provided by the user.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

role.description: The role of the user on the platform.

applicationStatus.description: The status of a teacher's application, if applicable.

subjects.description: For subject teachers, a list of subjects they teach.

experience.description: For subject teachers, a summary of their teaching experience.

class.description: For students and class teachers, the class they are associated with (e.g., '8', '10').

section.description: For students and class teachers, the section of the class they are associated with (e.g., 'A', 'B').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

LiveSession.title: LiveSession
LiveSession.description: Represents an active YouTube Live teaching session for a course.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a subject category used to organize and classify courses.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

description.description: A brief description of the category.

Lecture.title: Lecture
Lecture.description: Represents an individual lecture or content unit within a chapter.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Lecture entity.

lectureNumber.description: The sequential number of this lecture within its chapter.

type.description: The type of content for the lecture (e.g., 'video', 'text').

content.description: The content of the lecture (URL for video, text for text).

durationSeconds.description: The duration of the lecture in seconds.

Chapter.title: Chapter
Chapter.description: Represents a chapter within a course, containing a list of lectures.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Chapter entity.

order.description: The sequential order of this chapter within its course.

lectures.description: An array of lectures that belong to this chapter.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents an educational course offered on the platform, containing details about its content and instructor.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Course entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the course content and objectives.

instructorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the instructor who created this course. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Course)

instructorName.description: Denormalized name of the instructor for display purposes.

instructorAvatarUrl.description: Denormalized avatar URL of the instructor for display purposes.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to the thumbnail image for the course.

price.description: The price of the course, if it is not free.

difficultyLevel.description: The designated difficulty level of the course (e.g., 'Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced').

categoryIds.description: References to Category entities that this course belongs to. (Relationship: Category N:N Course)

targetClass.description: The specific class this course is intended for (e.g., '8', '10').

chapters.description: An array of chapters that make up the course.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the course was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the course was last updated.

status.description: The current status of the course (e.g., 'Draft', 'Published', 'Archived').

Enrollment.title: Enrollment
Enrollment.description: Records a student's registration and overall progress for a specific course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Enrollment entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the student who enrolled. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Enrollment)

courseId.description: Reference to the Course the student is enrolled in. (Relationship: Course 1:N Enrollment)

enrollmentDate.description: Timestamp when the student enrolled in the course.

completionDate.description: Timestamp when the student completed the course.

status.description: The current status of the enrollment (e.g., 'InProgress', 'Completed', 'Dropped').

overallProgressPercentage.description: The calculated overall progress of the student within the course, from 0 to 100.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

definition.description: Active live sessions for a course.

params.name: courseId
params.description: Unique identifier for the published/archived course.

params.name: instructorId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the instructor.

params.name: courseId
params.description: Unique identifier for the draft course.

definition.description: Tracks a student's enrollment in a course.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the student.

params.name: courseId
params.description: Unique identifier for the course the student is enrolled in.
